meaning: routine; everyday business; daily operation (of a company)
sentence: 她负责公司的常务工作，每天都很忙。
pinyin: Tā fù zé gōng sī de cháng wù gōng zuò, měi tiān dōu hěn máng.
english: She handles the company's day-to-day operations and is busy every day.

meaning: 1. to imagine; 2. to make up; 3. fictitious; 4. theoretical; 5. hypoth
sentence: 他喜欢在虚拟世界里探索。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān zài xūnǐ shìjiè lǐ tànsuǒ.
english: He enjoys exploring in virtual worlds.

sentence: 汽车燃料用完了，要去加油。
pinyin: Qìchē ránliào yòng wán le, yào qù jiāyóu.
english: The car has run out of fuel — we need to fill up.

sentence: 他们队赢得了今年的篮球联赛冠军。
pinyin: Tā men duì yíng dé le jīn nián de lán qiú lián sài guàn jūn.
english: Their team won the basketball league championship this year.

sentence: 孩子出生后要按时接种疫苗。
pinyin: Háizi chūshēng hòu yào ànshí jiēzhòng yìmiáo.
english: After a baby is born, vaccines need to be given on schedule.
